description: Environmental sound effect definitions per area type.

Handle.description: Identifier for the sound environment configuration

Song.description: Background music reference from sounds.txt index

Day Ambience.description: Daytime ambient sound from sounds.txt index

Night Ambience.description: Nighttime ambient sound from sounds.txt index

Day Event.description: Daytime random event sound from sounds.txt index

Night Event.description: Nighttime random event sound from sounds.txt index

Event Delay.description: Delay between random event sounds in frames

Indoors.description: Whether this is an indoor area (affects sound processing)

Material 1.description: Primary ground material type for footstep sounds

Material 2.description: Secondary ground material type for footstep sounds

EAX Environ.description: EAX preset environment type for 3D audio reverb

EAX Room Vol.description: EAX room volume attenuation in millibels

EAX Room HF.description: EAX room high-frequency attenuation in millibels

EAX Decay Time.description: EAX reverb decay time in milliseconds

EAX Reflect.description: EAX early reflections level in millibels

EAX Reflect Delay.description: EAX early reflections delay in milliseconds

EAX Reverb.description: EAX late reverb level in millibels

EAX Rev Delay.description: EAX late reverb delay in milliseconds

EAX Room Roll.description: EAX room rolloff factor for distance attenuation
